Brandon Home Loans

FHA loans in Brandon, Florida

Just east of Tampa, Brandon is one of the area's most established and affordable suburbs, with family neighborhoods spilling into nearby Valrico and Bloomingdale. Its mix of older single-family homes and newer communities, at prices well within the FHA limit, makes it a dependable FHA market — and an easy commute to Tampa keeps demand steady.

Hillsborough County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Brandon

With the 2026 FHA limit of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Brandon home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Brandon's affordable market, that covers the vast majority of homes for sale. A few Florida counties are set higher, so confirm Hillsborough County's exact figure with HUD.

FHA value in Tampa's eastern suburbs

Brandon offers Tampa access at suburban prices, with homes that sit comfortably under the FHA limit — ideal for first-time buyers and growing families. Newer homes in Valrico and Bloomingdale pass the FHA appraisal easily; older homes that need updates can use an FHA 203(k) renovation loan. Pair FHA with Florida assistance to lower your upfront cash.

Down payment help for Brandon buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Brandon buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Hillsborough County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Brandon

We help buyers throughout Brandon and Hillsborough County, including Brandon, Valrico, and Bloomingdale. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Brandon (Hillsborough County) for 2026?+
Hillsborough County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers nearly all Brandon homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Brandon a good FHA market?+
Yes — it offers affordable Tampa-area homes within the FHA limit, making it a dependable market for first-time and family buyers.
How much home can I buy with FHA in Brandon?+
With the $541,287 limit and 3.5% down, you can finance a home up to roughly $560,000 — well above the typical Brandon price.
How much down payment do I need in Brandon?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Hillsborough County?+
Yes — Brandon, Valrico, Riverview, Tampa, and surrounding communities.
